title: mentha pulegium subsp. micrantha
intro: Mentha pulegium subsp. micrantha, also known as peppermint-leafed pennyroyal or dwarf pennyroyal, is a subspecies of the perennial herb pennyroyal (Mentha pulegium). This plant is known for its medicinal properties, which include its ability to act as an antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and digestive aid due to its high concentration of essential oils, particularly pulegone and menthone. The health benefits of Mentha pulegium subsp. micrantha include its use in treating digestive issues, such as nausea and indigestion, as well as its potential in reducing stress and anxiety. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, and is also used in aromatherapy to promote relaxation and improve mood.
